title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Mapei India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Mapei India
jsonLd.description:
We at Mapei India are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mapei India:
Mapei India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mapei India!
